name: ESCAPE It Was Supposed to be a Kidnapping
original_name: ESCAPE それは誘拐のはずだった
overview: A wealthy pharmaceutical CEO's daughter is kidnapped on her 20th birthday, but when the botched abduction leaves one captor stunned, the seemingly obedient heiress shocks everyone by begging her would-be kidnapper to flee with her, sparking a chaotic manhunt that unravels dangerous secrets about her true identity and forces both fugitives to confront their twisted destinies.

trailers.title: 【予告】ドラマ「ESCAPE それは誘拐のはずだった」｜Huluオリジナルストーリー配信中
【コメント映像】ドラマ「ESCAPE それは誘拐のはずだった」｜Huluにて最新話まで見逃し配信中
